no: Post-install fix/balance/convenience mod by AngelGryph. Auto-detects installed mods and applies targeted bug fixes, resolves known conflicts, and adds QoL improvements. Install late (after all content mods, before EET_End)

conflicts.reason: mih_metamod cleanup (cn:4) MAKE_BIFF of 139K files into 7.2GB bif corrupts IDS files (TRIGGER.IDS, AREATYPE.IDS). EET_end cannot parse the biffed IDS files and fails.

sum: Made in Heaven meta-mod for BG1: auto-configures recommended component selections for the Made in Heaven mod family.

co.n: Patch known bugs in installed mods
co.tp2n: Patch known bugs in installed mods
co.no: Auto-scans for known mod bugs: D0QP Reynald equipment fix, SCS/BG1NPC illegal filename cleanup, Stone of Askavar item fixes, Saradas Magic 2 proficiency fix

co.n: Resolve known conflicts in installed mods
co.tp2n: Resolve known conflicts in installed mods
co.no: Fixes Gavin BG1 vs Stone of Askavar area overlap (moves SoA to House 10), fixes NPC relocation issues
Upgrades The Calling exotic items from non-magical to +1 for EE (vanilla already sells them in prologue)
BST: moves robes of archmagi from High Hedge to tower mage shop
Removes unnecessary files from override to reduce load times

co.n: Remove file clutter left by mods
co.tp2n: Remove file clutter left by mods
co.no: Removes OS temp files (.DS_Store, Thumbs.db, desktop.ini) from mod folders in override. Pure cleanup — no gameplay impact. Should run last after all mods are installed.
